model_assumptions: The reviewed self-hosted bridge implements a linear single-use Open payload state.
Cancellation and expiry consume that same local Open state.
Replay attempts occur only after a successful local submit and are rejected by the resolver.

run.stdout:
theory XamanSelfHostedResolution

begin

// Function signature and definition of the equational theory E

functions: fst/1, pair/2, snd/1
equations: fst(<x.1, x.2>) = x.1, snd(<x.1, x.2>) = x.2

rule (modulo E) Issue:
   [ Fr( ~payload ) ] --[ PayloadIssued( ~payload ) ]-> [ Open( ~payload ) ]

  /* has exactly the trivial AC variant */

rule (modulo E) Submit:
   [ Open( payload ) ]
  --[ SubmitAccepted( payload ) ]->
   [ Submitted( payload ), ReplayEligible( payload ) ]

  /* has exactly the trivial AC variant */

rule (modulo E) Cancel:
   [ Open( payload ) ]
  --[ Cancelled( payload ) ]->
   [ CancelledState( payload ) ]

  /* has exactly the trivial AC variant */

rule (modulo E) Expire:
   [ Open( payload ) ]
  --[ Expired( payload ) ]->
   [ ExpiredState( payload ) ]

  /* has exactly the trivial AC variant */

rule (modulo E) ReplayBlocked:
   [ Submitted( payload ), ReplayEligible( payload ) ]
  --[ ReplayBlocked( payload ) ]->
   [ Submitted( payload ), ReplayRejected( payload ) ]

  // loop breaker: [0]
  /* has exactly the trivial AC variant */

lemma submit_is_single_use:
  all-traces
  "∀ payload #i #j.
    ((SubmitAccepted( payload ) @ #i) ∧ (SubmitAccepted( payload ) @ #j)) ⇒
    (#i = #j)"
/*
guarded formula characterizing all counter-examples:
"∃ payload #i #j.
  (SubmitAccepted( payload ) @ #i) ∧ (SubmitAccepted( payload ) @ #j)
 ∧
  ¬(#i = #j)"
*/
simplify
solve( (#i < #j)  ∥ (#j < #i) )
  case case_1
  solve( Open( payload ) ▶₀ #i )
    case Issue
    solve( Open( ~payload ) ▶₀ #j )
      case Issue
      by contradiction /* cyclic */
    qed
  qed
next
  case case_2
  solve( Open( payload ) ▶₀ #i )
    case Issue
    solve( Open( ~payload ) ▶₀ #j )
      case Issue
      by contradiction /* cyclic */
    qed
  qed
qed

lemma cancellation_blocks_later_submit:
  all-traces
  "∀ payload #i #j.
    ((Cancelled( payload ) @ #i) ∧ (SubmitAccepted( payload ) @ #j)) ⇒
    (#j < #i)"
/*
guarded formula characterizing all counter-examples:
"∃ payload #i #j.
  (Cancelled( payload ) @ #i) ∧ (SubmitAccepted( payload ) @ #j)
 ∧
  ¬(#j < #i)"
*/
simplify
solve( Open( payload ) ▶₀ #i )
  case Issue
  by solve( Open( ~payload ) ▶₀ #j )
qed

lemma expiry_blocks_later_submit:
  all-traces
  "∀ payload #i #j.
    ((Expired( payload ) @ #i) ∧ (SubmitAccepted( payload ) @ #j)) ⇒
    (#j < #i)"
/*
guarded formula characterizing all counter-examples:
"∃ payload #i #j.
  (Expired( payload ) @ #i) ∧ (SubmitAccepted( payload ) @ #j)
 ∧
  ¬(#j < #i)"
*/
simplify
solve( Open( payload ) ▶₀ #i )
  case Issue
  by solve( Open( ~payload ) ▶₀ #j )
qed

lemma replay_block_requires_prior_submit:
  all-traces
  "∀ payload #i.
    (ReplayBlocked( payload ) @ #i) ⇒
    (∃ #j. (SubmitAccepted( payload ) @ #j) ∧ (#j < #i))"
/*
guarded formula characterizing all counter-examples:
"∃ payload #i.
  (ReplayBlocked( payload ) @ #i)
 ∧
  ∀ #j. (SubmitAccepted( payload ) @ #j) ⇒ ¬(#j < #i)"
*/
simplify
solve( ReplayEligible( payload ) ▶₁ #i )
  case Submit
  by contradiction /* from formulas */
qed

lemma terminal_paths_are_reachable:
  exists-trace
  "∃ submitted cancelled expired replayed #i #j #k #l.
    (((SubmitAccepted( submitted ) @ #i) ∧ (Cancelled( cancelled ) @ #j)) ∧
     (Expired( expired ) @ #k)) ∧
    (ReplayBlocked( replayed ) @ #l)"
/*
guarded formula characterizing all satisfying traces:
"∃ submitted cancelled expired replayed #i #j #k #l.
  (SubmitAccepted( submitted ) @ #i) ∧
  (Cancelled( cancelled ) @ #j) ∧
  (Expired( expired ) @ #k) ∧
  (ReplayBlocked( replayed ) @ #l)"
*/
simplify
solve( Open( submitted ) ▶₀ #i )
  case Issue
  solve( Open( cancelled ) ▶₀ #j )
    case Issue
    solve( Open( expired ) ▶₀ #k )
      case Issue
      solve( ReplayEligible( replayed ) ▶₁ #l )
        case Submit
        solve( Submitted( ~payload.3 ) ▶₀ #l )
          case Submit
          SOLVED // trace found
        qed
      qed
    qed
  qed
qed

/* All wellformedness checks were successful. */
